content.fact_text: Production-ready DatabaseService implementation for managing PostgreSQL connections with Knex, circuit breaking, and ACID-compliant transaction support.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes a singleton PostgreSQL connection pool using Knex, implements an Opossum circuit breaker for database operations, and provides a transactional wrapper with automatic retry logic for deadlocks. Monitors pool health and metrics.
interfaces: runTransaction<T>(work: (trx: Knex.Transaction) => Promise<T>, retries?: number): Promise<T>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a centralized, production-ready, resilient database access layer for the application, handling connections, transactions, and observability.
